title: plocama dubia
intro: Plocama dubia is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the yellow-flowered spurge or yellow-flowered plocama. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Plocama dubia is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. The herbal preparation of Plocama dubia is often taken in the form of a tea or tincture, made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
